  1. uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool
  2. ToolExecutionStatus

Uses of Enum Class
uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.ToolExecutionStatus

Packages that use ToolExecutionStatus
Package
Description
uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool
Provides the core framework for defining, managing, and executing local Java tools.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi
Defines the model-agnostic domain model for the tool (function) calling subsystem.
uno.anahata.asi.nb.ui.render
Provides the visual rendering layer for agentic file write operations within NetBeans.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi
Provides the core UI orchestration components for individual AGI sessions.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.message.part.tool
Provides UI components for rendering tool-related message parts.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.message.part.tool.param
Provides specialized renderers for individual tool parameters.

    Class
    Description
    enum 
    ToolExecutionStatus
    Represents the lifecycle status of a single tool's execution.
